LanguageData.AM_AncientDismantlingWorkbench.descripti: An ancient dismantling table that integrates machinery and sewing.
LanguageData.AM_AncientDismantlingWorkbench.label: ancient dismantling table
LanguageData.AM_DiningChair.description: A comfortable and attractive chair. Can be used at tables, work stations, and elsewhere.
LanguageData.AM_DiningChair.label: dining chair
LanguageData.AM_DownwardStairs.description: A staircase descends into the basement, where it is quite dark.
LanguageData.AM_DownwardStairs.label: Ancient construction site staircase
LanguageData.AM_ElectricalBox.description: A electrical box used to supply power to multi story building facilities, which can adjust the output power of each floor freely.
LanguageData.AM_ElectricalBox.label: electrical box
LanguageData.AM_Exit_L.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation.
LanguageData.AM_Exit_L.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_Exit_S.description: An upward escalator that has ceased operation.
LanguageData.AM_Exit_S.label: Ancient escalator
LanguageData.AM_LargeScreenTelevision.description: A super large ancient television capable of displaying 3D images, providing an entertainment experience akin to a 3D cinema.
LanguageData.AM_LargeScreenTelevision.label: large-screen television
LanguageData.AM_SmallGenerator.label: small fuel generator
LanguageData.AM_Trader.description: Ancient logistics terminal, this is part of the ancient underground automatic logistics system.You can purchase goods from ancient material storage stations through the interactive panel, which constitutes a logistics system within an ancient city.
LanguageData.AM_Trader.label: ancient logistics terminal
LanguageData.AM_TransportPod.description: A launchable sub-orbital cargo pod capable of carrying people, items, or animals. Can be used for sending gifts, transporting people or supplies, surprise attacks, or reinforcing battles.
LanguageData.AM_TransportPod.label: transport pod
